text:
Rate Adjustment Algorithms
Option 1: P-Controller (Proportional Control)
ratio = log10((current_dwell + 1) / (target_dwell + 1))
change = gain x ratio
(capped at 25% of current rate)
new_rate = current_rate - change
(min: 5% of initial rate)
Config
init_rate_per_sec
Description
Starting rate when limiting begins
burst_capacity_secs
Burst window size
target_dwell_time_micros
Target latency to maintain
gain
Sensitivity (higher = more aggressive)
Characteristics:
- Smooth, gradual adjustments
- Log scale handles large deviations gracefully
- Max 25% change per tick (prevents oscillation)
- Minimum 11 ticks to go from init to min rate
Option 2: AIMD (Additive Increase / Multiplicative Decrease)
If dwell > target: new_rate = current_rate × decrease_factor
If dwell < target: new_rate = current_rate + increase_step
If dwell == target: no change
(multiplicative)
(additive)
Config
Description
init_rate_per_sec
Starting rate
burst_capacity_secs
target_dwell_time_micros
decrease_factor
increase_step
Burst window
Target latency
Multiplier when overloaded (e.g., 0.5 = halve)
Additive increase when healthy
Characteristics:
- Classic TCP congestion control approach
- Aggressive on overload (multiplicative drop)
- Conservative recovery (additive increase)
Option 3: Fixed Rate
Static rate and burst capacity. No adaptation. Testing/baseline only.
Policy Tick Lifecycle
Every tick (default: 1000ms)
→ POLL PHASE
- Read CPU pressure from /proc
Read memory signals from /proc
• Execute serverStatus (max 400ms timeout)
- Measure command latency
Extract dwell times, admission stats
Add signals to history buffer
Return: overload_detected (bool)
TUNE PHASE
If overload detected:
- Call algorithm.tune() → get new_rate
• Set ingressRequestAdmissionRatePerSec = new_rate
Set ingressRequestAdmissionBurstCapacitySecs
Set ingressRequestRateLimiterEnabled = true
Record overload_timestamp
Fire Atlas alert (log ID 44406)
Else if currently_limiting:
- Check: has hold_duration elapsed?
- Nes: disante rate timeter, reset state
extend hold if rate decreased
Fire Atlas inactive alert (log ID 44407)
Else: do nothing
